user_query: I'm a nutritionist and I'm working with clients who want to maintain a healthy weight. Can you assist me in calculating their Body Mass Index (BMI) using their weights and heights? Additionally, provide me with the women's marks from the World Athletics Scoring Tables for clients who fall within a specific BMI range. Moreover, suggest some nutritious meal plans for them to achieve their weight goals.

TaskList.description: Collect weights and heights of clients for BMI calculation.
Calculate Body Mass Index (BMI) for each client based on their weights and heights.
Query the World Athletics Scoring Tables to retrieve women's marks for specific BMI ranges.
Suggest nutritious meal plans tailored to help clients achieve their weight goals.
